# publishToChannel

> Connects a solution to a messaging channel

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| solutionId | string | yes |
| channel | string | yes |
| config | json | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[solution: call findSolutionById]
  A --> B[checkActive: condition]
  B --> C[channelRecord: call createSolutionChannel]
  C --> D[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `SolutionChannel`
